report.summary: Audited 11 recently published/queued pages for UX issues, created 7 missing OG images, added BackToTop to 3 pages, and fixed 6 broken OG image references across learn guides.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added BackToTop component to grayscale-hype-etf-defi-guide (was missing scroll-to-top on long page)
Added BackToTop component to congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026 (was missing scroll-to-top)
Added BackToTop component to bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide (was missing scroll-to-top)
Fixed OG image reference format mismatch on grayscale-hype-etf-defi-guide (.png → .svg)
Fixed OG image reference format mismatch on congressional-tokenization-hearing-guide-2026 (.png → .svg)
Fixed OG image reference format mismatch on bitgo-ipo-crypto-infrastructure-guide (.png → .svg)
Fixed 3 inconsistent OG image references on ai-agent-frameworks-comparison-2026 (.jpg/.png → .svg)
Verified mobile layout responsiveness across all 11 audited pages — all use clamp(), auto-fit grids, and responsive padding
Confirmed no input validation issues — all recent pages are educational content (no forms/calculators)
Verified Breadcrumb and StructuredData usage consistent across all audited pages

sections.title: Known Issues (Deferred)
items: 4 learn pages use 'use client' without Next.js Metadata export — SEO metadata relies on StructuredData only (not blocking but suboptimal)
No unified LearnPage wrapper component — each page re-implements layout styling inline (maintenance debt)
DVT guide and Grayscale guide missing Table of Contents sections (lower priority)
